overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded protagonist walking through an ancient Mediterranean city. The character journeys from narrow alleys through sunlit cobblestone streets, past a camel rider, up stairs through a monumental gate with statues, and into a bustling courtyard market with wooden stalls and NPCs.

turns right around large stone pedestal base

large rectangular stone pedestal with decorative carvings

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a narrow alley beside a tall stone wall, emerging into a sunlit cobblestone street. The camera follows as the character turns around a large stone pedestal, revealing Mediterranean-style stone buildings with wooden balconies lining the street ahead.

begins ascending the sloped street toward the staircase

wide stone staircase leading upward to a gated entrance

segments.scene_description: Walking up the ascending cobblestone street lined with stone buildings, the character passes a camel rider moving in the opposite direction. The street slopes upward toward a visible stone staircase leading to a gated entrance in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: monumental staircase leading to gated entrance with statues

approaching the gate with twin white statues on tall pillars
person on donkey passes through the gate heading outward

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide stone staircase flanked by ivy-covered walls, approaching a monumental gate topped with twin white marble statues. A person on a donkey passes through the gate heading outward as the character continues climbing toward the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air market courtyard with wooden stalls and colonnades

events.description: passes through gate into the courtyard market area
turns left to navigate around wooden market stalls
moving from covered market area into open garden courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through the market courtyard, navigating around wooden stalls and groups of NPCs

white fabric shade canopy stretched between buildings

row of stone columns supporting building facade

segments.scene_description: Passing through the gate into a sunlit courtyard market, the character navigates around wooden stalls shaded by fabric canopies. The area features large clay pots, a central palm tree, and groups of NPCs browsing goods. The character turns left, moving past a stone colonnade and deeper into the courtyard garden area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the confines of a narrow alleyway into the expansive brightness of a bustling courtyard market. It begins beside a tall stone wall, emerging into a sunlit cobblestone street as the camera rounds a large pedestal to reveal Mediterranean buildings with wooden balconies. As the character ascends the sloping street, the view opens up to pass a camel rider before shifting toward a wide stone staircase flanked by ivy-covered walls. The camera then follows the climb toward a monumental gate topped with white marble statues, passing a donkey rider heading outward just as the character enters the gateway. Finally, the scene expands into a sunlit market filled with fabric-shaded stalls and clay pots, moving past a central palm tree and a stone colonnade deeper into the courtyard garden.
